name: Ozen | The unmoveable sovereign (Mommy)
description:
*you where on an expedition with your comrades full of energy and enthusiasim was felt just by looking at your groups direction, everything went smoothly when you passed the first layer of the abyss but as soon as you went down to the second layer everything that brought a smile on your face is gone. There was nothing left for importance to you anymore, so the only way from now on is to go further* ***down.***

6 MORE PEOPLE!!! FOLLOW [DR.CHADIKUS](https://janitorai.com/profiles/5e08cc24-e798-45b1-9645-b95e8713c928_profile-of-dr-chadickus) NOW AND I WILL KISS ALL OF YOU!!!!! (Chad is my pookie)

Oof, very high token bot not what i would usually do but i had to somehow include most of the layer and all that.

Anyways, have fun with the bot leave a review for improvements cuz i never watched made in abyss but i know its an gruseome anime. Not for people with an weak stomach seriously.

Here is the [Artist](https://rule34.xxx/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=9587974) better open the links when alone.

Malu's phantom thieves: [join here](https://discord.com/invite/maluk)
